_comment: Act 3 / Challenge 3.4 — The Elevator Hack (Combat + sub-GHz puzzle). Consumed by beacon FW and the simulator. Also stored at /spiffs/challenge_3_4.json on the C3 beacon.
landmark: City Hall elevator bank, lobby level

subghz._comment: 315 MHz — North-American building-automation / elevator controller band (standard for commercial BAS). Badge must transmit accessCode in this window before combat is unlocked.
subghz._fallback_note: When the badge has no subghz cap the beacon auto-opens the handshake gate after timing_window_ms/3, sets subghzHandshakeDone=true in the relay flags, and proceeds to combat. Game remains fully playable on base firmware.

combat._waves_note: Each wave clears one alarm tier. Two waves = two BAS security layers defeated.

custom._requires_note: Operative must hold the OEMC Dispatch Credential (challenge 3.3) to begin.

sim._comment: Simulator-specific overrides. The bun/TypeScript sim reads this block.
sim._location_note: Approximate Chicago City Hall / Loop coordinates for the sim map.
